Title: Lead Data Analyst
Description:
🚀 Lead Data & Analytics | Remote (Netherlands)




We’re looking for a Lead Data & Analytics professional to own and shape a growing Data function into a scalable, modern platform that enables decision-making across the business.

This is a hands-on leadership role where you will combine technical depth with strategic influence, helping transform an evolving DataOps setup into a unified, product-oriented data capability.




You’ll lead a cross-functional team, define the data strategy, and ensure data engineering, analytics, and BI work together as a coherent ecosystem. At the same time, you’ll stay close to the technology-shaping architecture, improving pipelines, and setting standards for quality, governance, and scalability.




You’ll also play a key role in stakeholder alignment, prioritisation, and turning ambiguity into clear direction and execution.




What you bring:

Strong experience leading data teams in Agile environments, solid background in data engineering and analytics, hands-on SQL and Python in production, and the ability to balance technical leadership with people management and communication.




If you’re ready to build structure, elevate a team, and have real impact on how data is used across an organisation, this role offers that opportunity.

Show more

You’ll lead a cross-functional team, define the data strategy, and ensure data engineering, analytics, and BI work together as a coherent ecosystem. At the same time, you’ll stay close to the technology-shaping architecture, improving pipelines, and setting standards for quality, governance, and scalability.


You’ll also play a key role in stakeholder alignment, prioritisation, and turning ambiguity into clear direction and execution.


What you bring:

Strong experience leading data teams in Agile environments, solid background in data engineering and analytics, hands-on SQL and Python in production, and the ability to balance technical leadership with people management and communication.


If you’re ready to build structure, elevate a team, and have real impact on how data is used across an organisation, this role offers that opportunity.

Title: Data Analist / BI Specialist
HTML:
Als Data Analist / BI Specialist zorg jij ervoor dat organisaties hun data omzetten in waardevolle inzichten. Je analyseert complexe datasets, vertaalt deze naar heldere rapportages en dashboards en adviseert stakeholders over datagedreven beslissingen. Met moderne BI-tools zoals Power BI, Tableau of Qlik maak je informatie toegankelijk en begrijpelijk. Daarmee help je onze klanten – zoals de Belastingdienst, Gemeente Den Haag, Centraal Justitieel Incassobureau en VGZ – om hun beleid en processen te verbeteren en toekomstgericht te sturen.


Waarom past deze vacature bij jou?

Je hebt een passie voor data en ziet het als jouw missie om cijfers en informatie te vertalen naar verhalen die impact maken. Je bent analytisch sterk, communicatief vaardig en kunt schakelen tussen business en techniek. Je vindt het leuk om samen te werken met collega’s en stakeholders en voelt je thuis in een omgeving waar data centraal staat.


Wat kan je van ons verwachten?

Bij CIMSOLUTIONS krijg je de kans om te werken aan uitdagende en innovatieve data- en BI-projecten bij toonaangevende organisaties. Wij investeren in jouw ontwikkeling en bieden naast een inspirerende werkomgeving:

  • Een vast dienstverband voor onbepaalde tijd, een max. salaris van € 6.000, bonusregeling, leaseauto, pensioenregeling en maandelijkse onkostenvergoeding;
  • Opdrachtkeuzevrijheid: Jij bepaalt in overleg waar je aan werkt, met de begeleiding van een personal coach;
  • Per jaar € 5.000,- opleidingsbudget en daarnaast ook nog eens 5-10 dagen studietijd;
  • Kennissessies met vakgenoten en inhoudelijke events;
  • Minimaal 25 vakantiedagen, met de mogelijkheid om extra dagen op te bouwen of te verkopen;
  • Sociale events zoals sportdagen, weekend weg en gezellige borrels;
  • Een vestiging bij jou in de buurt.


Persoonlijke ontwikkeling

Bij CIMSOLUTIONS geloven we dat leren de sleutel is tot succes. Learn, create and make it work is niet alleen onze slogan, maar zit in ons DNA. Daarom investeren we continu in jouw groei. Je krijgt de ruimte om jezelf te ontwikkelen tot bijvoorbeeld Senior Data Analist, BI Architect of Data Platform Specialist. Je wordt begeleid door ervaren collega’s, krijgt toegang tot kennisplatforms en blijft altijd scherp op de nieuwste ontwikkelingen binnen jouw vakgebied.


CIMSOLUTIONS heeft een actief diversiteitsbeleid en streeft naar een evenwichtige verdeling van professionals naar onder andere leeftijd, gender, etnische achtergrond en cultuur, arbeidsvermogen, kennis en competenties. Daarbij benadrukken wij dat gelijke kansen voor iedereen een belangrijk uitgangspunt zijn in onze selectie.


Wat breng jij mee?

  • Afgeronde hbo- of wo-opleiding in Bedrijfskunde, Econometrie, Data Science, Business Intelligence of vergelijkbaar;
  • Minimaal 4 jaar ervaring als Data Analist of BI Specialist;
  • Ervaring met BI-tools zoals Power BI, Tableau of Qlik;
  • Sterke kennis van SQL en ervaring met het analyseren van grote datasets;
  • Affiniteit met datavisualisatie, datakwaliteit en rapportage;
  • AI-affiniteit is een pré;
  • Goede beheersing van de Nederlandse en Engelse taal.

Title: Intern - Digital Data Science and Analytics
Description:
JOIN OUR AMSTERDAM DIGITAL DATA SCIENCE AND ANALYTICS TEAMS!

At adidas, we believe that data is one of the most important resources, that enables us to better understand our consumer, enhance their experience and connect them to their passion. In the Digital Data Science and Digital Analytics teams, we create fact-based insights through a holistic, integrated, and actionable storytelling approach across all relevant digital marketing initiatives to help improve and shape our future digital publishing and media plans, tactics, content strategies and brand narratives.

DIGITAL DATA SCIENCE: The Digital Data Science team at adidas focuses on forecasting and pricing solutions by leveraging advanced Machine Learning models to support buying, planning, and trading decisions. They provide forecasting and price recommendations during key commercial events like Black Friday and seasonal sales periods, with solutions live across the globe.

In parallel, the team is actively evolving toward agentic AI‑powered decision support, building AI trading agents. This includes exposing pricing and forecasting capabilities through intelligent agents, orchestrating model workflows via natural‑language interactions, and embedding governed business context to ensure reliable, explainable outputs.

Operating in an Agile setup, the team collaborates closely with data engineers, ML operations engineers, solution architects, and business teams to experiment with new AI‑native workflows, improve model performance, and translate complex data science solutions into intuitive, self‑service tools for markets.

DIGITAL ANALYTICS: Digital Analytics Team at adidas is responsible for delivering cutting-edge analytics services to internal stakeholders, enabling them to make fact-based decisions. We manage the generation of insights that help adidas understand consumer behavior and performance related analytics to ultimately help drive sales.

DIGITAL PARTNER ANALYTICS: The Digital Partner teamCollaborates with the various Partner and Wholesale teams to capture reporting requirements and support Analytics team to implement these. Support the Analytics team enhancing the backend structure of our performance dashboards. Pro-actively seek for new reporting opportunities to provide our teams additional performance insights.GROW YOUR CAPABILITIES THROUGH MEANINGFUL TASKS & PROJECTS


Project Contribution:Contribute to assigned AI and data science projects, supporting tasks such as model implementation, experimentation workflows, and integration with applications or databases.
Reporting and Best Practices:Support the implementation of reporting structures for communicating model results and data-driven insights. Follow best practices in data science, experimentation, and documentation.
Data Analysis and Visualization:Apply data analysis techniques to explore datasets, perform feature engineering, and support model development. Utilize visualization tools to effectively communicate findings and model outcomes.
Machine Learning & AI:Support the development and implementation of machine learning models by assisting in data preparation, experimentation, and evaluation. Contribute to exploring AI agents, and RAG-based solutions to generate intelligent, scalable insights.
Operationalization and Automation:Assist in automating data workflows, model pipelines, and reporting processes. Support experimentation with modern tools and frameworks for ML deployment and scalable AI solutions.


WHAT WOULD MAKE YOU A MATCH?


Student of Data Science, Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field
Strong problem-solving and analytical skills with a structured way of thinking
Initial experience or coursework in machine learning or data science projects
Strong written and verbal communication skills
Hands-on working style with the ability to learn quickly and meet deadlines
Agile, open-minded team player with a passion to connect sports and lifestyle with AI, technology, and innovation
Eagerness to continuously improve oneself and to further develop own skills
Fluent in English
Affinity to digital tools and modern AI frameworks
Strong MS Office skills (especially PowerPoint and Excel)
Proficiency in Python and/or SQL; familiarity with Machine learning/Deep Learning libraries
Exposure to LLMs, RAG, or AI agents is a plus


What's In It For You


Employee discounts on products
Chances to attend and take part in on campus events and sponsored adidas events/games
Structured training and development, access to LinkedIn Learning, Language Training and adidas Learning Portal
Possibility to join our mentorship program, networking opportunities or employee resource groups
International intern community and work environment
Regular development conversations as part of your role
Inspiring campus with canteens, cafes, reflection rooms and sport facilities including an on-site gym (free)
Company events focusing on sports and mental health
Flexible and agile working arrangements (40% home office possible)
Monthly gross allowance: 1.200,00€


ELIGIBILITY


Enrolled as full-time student for the complete duration of the internship
Candidates in penultimate year of study preferred (following the internship, students should have maximum one year to graduate)
Availability for the full duration (6 months) of the internship from September 2026 – January 2027
Local to Amsterdam/Ability to relocate to Amsterdam for the full duration of the internship


KEY FACTS

JOIN OUR AMSTERDAM DIGITAL DATA SCIENCE AND ANALYTICS TEAMS!

At adidas, we believe that data is one of the most important resources, that enables us to better understand our consumer, enhance their experience and connect them to their passion. In the Digital Data Science and Digital Analytics teams, we create fact-based insights through a holistic, integrated, and actionable storytelling approach across all relevant digital marketing initiatives to help improve and shape our future digital publishing and media plans, tactics, content strategies and brand narratives.

DIGITAL DATA SCIENCE: The Digital Data Science team at adidas focuses on forecasting and pricing solutions by leveraging advanced Machine Learning models to support buying, planning, and trading decisions. They provide forecasting and price recommendations during key commercial events like Black Friday and seasonal sales periods, with solutions live across the globe.

In parallel, the team is actively evolving toward agentic AI‑powered decision support, building AI trading agents. This includes exposing pricing and forecasting capabilities through intelligent agents, orchestrating model workflows via natural‑language interactions, and embedding governed business context to ensure reliable, explainable outputs.

Operating in an Agile setup, the team collaborates closely with data engineers, ML operations engineers, solution architects, and business teams to experiment with new AI‑native workflows, improve model performance, and translate complex data science solutions into intuitive, self‑service tools for markets.

DIGITAL ANALYTICS: Digital Analytics Team at adidas is responsible for delivering cutting-edge analytics services to internal stakeholders, enabling them to make fact-based decisions. We manage the generation of insights that help adidas understand consumer behavior and performance related analytics to ultimately help drive sales.

DIGITAL PARTNER ANALYTICS: The Digital Partner teamCollaborates with the various Partner and Wholesale teams to capture reporting requirements and support Analytics team to implement these. Support the Analytics team enhancing the backend structure of our performance dashboards. Pro-actively seek for new reporting opportunities to provide our teams additional performance insights.GROW YOUR CAPABILITIES THROUGH MEANINGFUL TASKS & PROJECTS

  • Data Analysis and Visualization:Apply data analysis techniques to explore datasets, perform feature engineering, and support model development. Utilize visualization tools to effectively communicate findings and model outcomes.
  • Machine Learning & AI:Support the development and implementation of machine learning models by assisting in data preparation, experimentation, and evaluation. Contribute to exploring AI agents, and RAG-based solutions to generate intelligent, scalable insights.
  • Operationalization and Automation:Assist in automating data workflows, model pipelines, and reporting processes. Support experimentation with modern tools and frameworks for ML deployment and scalable AI solutions.

  • Student of Data Science, Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field

  • Strong written and verbal communication skills
  • Hands-on working style with the ability to learn quickly and meet deadlines
  • Agile, open-minded team player with a passion to connect sports and lifestyle with AI, technology, and innovation
  • Eagerness to continuously improve oneself and to further develop own skills
  • Fluent in English
  • Affinity to digital tools and modern AI frameworks
  • Strong MS Office skills (especially PowerPoint and Excel)
  • Proficiency in Python and/or SQL; familiarity with Machine learning/Deep Learning libraries

  • Possibility to join our mentorship program, networking opportunities or employee resource groups

  • Regular development conversations as part of your role
  • Inspiring campus with canteens, cafes, reflection rooms and sport facilities including an on-site gym (free)
  • Company events focusing on sports and mental health
  • Flexible and agile working arrangements (40% home office possible)
  • Monthly gross allowance: 1.200,00€

ELIGIBILITY

  • Enrolled as full-time student for the complete duration of the internship
  • Candidates in penultimate year of study preferred (following the internship, students should have maximum one year to graduate)

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Data Analyst




Are you a data/business professional passionate about using data to make meaningful impact? Read on and apply now for the role as Data Analyst at Anthony Veder!




Navigating the Future

Working at Anthony Veder means operating at the heart of the transition to a more sustainable world. We are always looking for new ways to challenge the status quo, developing new technological and logistical solutions to help our clients reach their goals.




We work in a culture of trust, openness, and creativity. Always keeping an eye on the long term. This is how we became pioneers in the maritime industry. To meet the vision to be an ambitious leader in gas shipping service solutions, Anthony Veder has identified the need for data-driven innovations and –decisions within the organization. This means that using data and insights should become a core part of our overall strategy, culture and business processes. The Data & Analytics team was founded to drive the transition to a data-driven organization.




The Data & Analytics team is responsible for creating value for Anthony Veder using data and analytics while providing a solid data foundation for our operation, both governance and architecture. The team supports the organization by managing a data platform that provides a single source of truth to every data consumer and by providing the insight to solve the challenges of our business. Also, the team is facilitating the adoption of these insights into the operational processes at Anthony Veder.




Your areas of expertise

• Understand business needs to identify challenges and risks better and make informed decisions on providing data insights.

• Collaborate with the team to continuously improve the way we work and process work to maximize our value to the organization.

• Gain a deeper understanding of the challenges and opportunities within our organization, deliver actionable insights for these and support the teams in organizing around this.

• Contribute to improving data literacy and create a culture of data-driven decision making within Anthony Veder.

• Contribute to establishing standards, guidelines and procedures to assure efficient and effective delivery of insights to the organization.

• Data modelling and data platforming with the ability to perform first line support and small changes on our data platform.




Additionally, what you can expect is

• A culture that expects and supports entrepreneurship.

• A position that offers a lot of autonomy and expects a high level of ownership for that autonomy.

• The opportunity to have a direct impact on the way the organization uses data.




What we offer

• A dynamic organization with an entrepreneurial character and informal and open culture.

• A competitive salary.

• An employer-financed pension scheme.

• 28 vacation days with the option to buy five more.

• Combining working from home and at our beautiful office in Rotterdam’s shipping district.




What we ask

• A higher professional education (HBO) or scientific/research education (WO, Bachelor or Master in a relevant domain such as business, IT, engineering or shipping.

• 3+ years of experience in a similar role.

• Ability to use Power BI and SQL, pre would also be coding skills with Python and Git.

• Excellent verbal and written command of English.

• Analytical mindset and ability to organize, refine and manage your work.




Do you have what it takes to be part of the AV family? Apply now and find out!

Title: Operations Data Analyst
Description:
Ready to play a key role in transforming how Nike uses data to drive business decisions? As a Data & Tooling Specialist, you will enable “insights to action” by building scalable reporting, automations, and dashboards that support business reviews and operational excellence.We’re looking for someone analytical, structured, and hands-on, who enjoys translating complex business needs into practical data solutions and tooling that drives clarity and impact.




This is a temporary assignment until 31 December 2026.




What are you going to do?

You will support EBP Operations by improving POS and Bookings reporting, while building scalable tools that enhance business reviews, decision-making, and follow‑through.

Streamline weekly RSV trend reporting, reducing manual effort and improving clarity for executive audiences
Automate POS (Sports x Marketplace) and Bookings reporting, eliminating manual “cut & paste” processes
Translate business requirements into scalable data models, workflows, and dashboards
Build and optimize dashboards (e.g., Answers, Tableau, Power BI) to drive actionable insights
Develop Airtable solutions (meeting tracking, actions, decisions, timelines) as a single source of truth
Set up automations (reminders, status tracking, notifications) to improve process discipline and follow‑up
Ensure data quality, consistency, and repeatable refresh logic across reporting and tooling




What do we offer?

Competitive salary (to be discussed with the recruiter)
Flexible hybrid work: 3 days in the office, 2 days from home
Unlimited vacation days to recharge whenever you need
8% holiday allowance
STIPP pension plan to secure your future
€0.23/km commuting allowance (up to €23 per office day)
€5 daily work-from-home allowance
25% employee store discount – gear up with Nike!
Access to Adecco Academy online learning for continuous growth
Free use of on-campus gym facilities to stay active
Bike plan to make your commute greener and healthier




Where will you work?

Nike, Inc., a global leader in athletic footwear, apparel, and innovation, is headquartered in Beaverton, Oregon, and serves as a beacon of inspiration for athletes worldwide. Its European Headquarters (EHQ) is located on a vibrant campus that reflects the brand's dynamic and innovative spirit. Surrounded by lush parks, cycling paths, and running tracks, the campus embodies Nike’s commitment to sustainability, health, and community. A melting pot of global talent, it fosters creativity and collaboration, driving forward-thinking ideas that shape the future of sports, culture, and lifestyle.




What do we ask?

Strong analytical mindset with experience translating business needs into data solutions
Solid SQL skills and experience working with data platforms such as Databricks or Snowflake
Experience with dashboarding tools (Answers, Tableau, Power BI) to deliver clear insights
Hands-on experience with Airtable (or similar tools), including workflows and automations
Ability to build scalable, low‑maintenance solutions rather than one-off analyses
Strong stakeholder management skills and ability to run lightweight requirement sessions
Structured, independent way of working with a focus on quality, usability, and impact




Are you interested?

Apply now via the button. If you need more information about the team, the company, the role; feel free to send an email to nike@adecco.nl. We will be more than happy to support!

Title: Business Data Analyst
Description:
Assignment description




Are you a data analyst who thrives in ambiguity? Someone who can connect fragmented systems, build a structure where there isn't any, and turn raw HR data into decisions that can move the needle?




A Dutch national infrastructure company is looking for a Business Data Analyst to lead the data-driven transformation of their talent and recruitment function. This is a high-impact role sitting at the intersection of HR, recruitment, and data strategy.




The challenge




Inflow, throughput, and outflow data live alone. ATS and HR systems do not talk to each other. Strategic decisions are being made without trustable insight. You come in and fix that, end to end.




What you will be doing




Mapping intern to permanent conversion flows and full employee journeys
Building Power BI dashboards that actually get used by leadership
Bridging ATS and HR systems and connecting fragmented data sources
Defining KPIs, cleaning recruitment data, and setting up structural reporting
Advising senior stakeholders and translating insights into concrete action
Running ad hoc analyses on labour market and recruitment topics, often via SAS




What we are looking for




Experience as a data or business analyst
Strong Power BI skills, building dashboards independently rather than just maintaining them
Experience with HR and/or recruitment data
Comfortable with web or marketing data
Process mapping experience in Visio or a similar tool




Why this role?




This is not a dashboard maintenance role. You are laying the analytical foundation for how one of the Netherlands' largest public organizations plans its workforce for the next decade. Real scope. Real impact.




Interested? Drop me a message or apply directly and I would love to tell you more.

Title: Functional Data Analyst
Description:
Functional / Data Analyst | Data Redesign | Major Dutch Bank

We are looking for an experienced Functional / Data Analyst to join a strategic data redesign project at a leading Dutch bank in Amsterdam. You will work at the heart of a modernisation effort, simplifying and future-proofing a complex data landscape to support Business Banking across multiple countries. This is an output-driven, independent role with real ownership, a sharp SQL focus, and direct impact on how data is used across the organisation.




About the role

You will be embedded in a multidisciplinary team of data engineers and analysts, contributing to the redesign of the DM-CAN and One Business Banking data landscape. Your core work involves translating business requirements into scalable data models, building and optimising SQL queries, tables and views, and defining data mappings that hold up in production. Beyond the technical side, you will support adoption of the new landscape, contributing to knowledge transfer materials and helping onboard analysts and users to the redesigned environment.




About you

Strong background in functional analysis within data or reporting environments
Hands-on SQL experience building, optimising, and troubleshooting queries, tables, and views in governed environments such as Oracle, BigQuery, or SAS
Solid knowledge of data modelling, data mappings, and analytical datasets
Experience contributing to end-state data design and supporting implementation or knowledge transfer
Able to work independently on agreed deliverables while collaborating closely with engineers and business stakeholders
Experience in a banking or financial services environment is a plus
Familiarity with Business Banking products is an advantage




About Levy Professionals

Since 2000 we provide professional solutions to organisations ranging from tech start-ups to global players. From our offices in Amsterdam and London we have built an international and local network of skilled employed professionals and contractors fuelled by our passion for connecting skills with projects. Over the years we have fulfilled over 2500 requirements and nowadays we consistently have 250+ professionals recruited and relocated from 14 countries allocated to various projects. Our strength is the way that we see and treat people. This will always be a key factor in our strategy for many years to come.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Bij Plieger worden dagelijks duizenden beslissingen genomen op basis van data. Van voorraadbeheer en logistiek tot commerciële prestaties en operationele processen. Om onze organisatie verder te laten groeien, zoeken wij een Data Analist die data weet om te zetten in waardevolle inzichten en begrijpt hoe de onderliggende data-architectuur werkt. Je komt terecht in een enthousiast IT-team en werkt nauw samen met een ervaren BI-specialist. Samen zorgen jullie ervoor dat de organisatie beschikt over betrouwbare stuurinformatie en datagedreven beslissingen kan nemen.




Wat ga je doen?

Als Data Analist vorm je de schakel tussen business, data en techniek. Je analyseert informatiebehoeften, vertaalt deze naar rapportages en dashboards en denkt mee over de verdere ontwikkeling van onze BI-omgeving.

Je houdt je onder andere bezig met:

Ontwikkelen en optimaliseren van dashboards en rapportages in Power BI
Analyseren van bedrijfsprocessen en informatiebehoeften
Onderhouden en verbeteren van datamodellen
Werken met SQL voor data-analyse en ontsluiting
Bewaken van datakwaliteit en betrouwbaarheid van rapportages
Vertalen van complexe data naar heldere inzichten
Samenwerken met BI-collega’s in Nederland en Nepal
Meedenken over de toekomst van Business Intelligence binnen Plieger




Wat breng je mee?

Je hoeft niet alles al te kunnen. We zoeken vooral iemand die nieuwsgierig is, analytisch sterk en graag verbanden legt.

Je hebt ervaring met:

Power BI
SQL
Datamodellering en datasets
Het vertalen van data naar concrete inzichten
Samenwerken met zowel technische als niet-technische stakeholders
Vloeiende beheersing van de Nederlandse taal (spreken en schrijven) is een harde eis.

Ervaring met Azure, Databricks of moderne data-platformen is een pré.







Wat bieden wij?

Salaris vanaf €4.500 bruto per maand
Fulltime functie (40 uur) met 2 ADV-uren per week
Hybride werken met veel flexibiliteit
Een organisatie waar Business Intelligence een belangrijke rol speelt
Samenwerking met collega's in Nederland en Nepal
Veel ruimte voor eigen initiatief en verbetering
Ontwikkelmogelijkheden binnen BI, Analytics en Data Engineering




Over Plieger Groep

Plieger Groep is bekend van de merken Plieger, ThermoNoord en Plieger Products. Met meer dan 650 collega's, ruim 90 vestigingen, een centraal distributiecentrum en een sterke Europese moederorganisatie (Cordes & Graefe) werken wij dagelijks aan slimme oplossingen voor installateurs, detaillisten en bouwmarkten. Achter deze organisatie schuilt een enorme hoeveelheid data en de kans om daar direct impact mee te maken.




Interesse?

Ben jij de Data Analist die techniek en business weet te verbinden? Solliciteer direct en ontdek hoe jij met data het verschil kunt maken bij Plieger.

Title: Digital (B2C) Analyst
HTML:
DIGITAL (B2C) ANALYST

Turn numbers into momentum.


Lijnden | B2C | 40 hours | Full-time

At Just Brands, we build menswear brands with character. PME Legend, Cast Iron and Vanguard each have their own voice, their own audience and their own place in the market. In B2C, growth comes from thousands of daily decisions across retail, ecommerce, marketing, CRM, marketplaces and the digital experience. The difference between “good” and “great” is clarity: knowing what’s happening, why it’s happening and what to do next.

But what really sets us apart is how we work together.

We’re team first. No ego, no unnecessary layers, no endless talking, no corporate theatre. We back each other, speak up, take ownership and keep pushing for better. We work hard, stay sharp and make sure there’s room to enjoy the ride too.


That’s where you come in.


Why this role matters

This is where insight becomes action. As our Digital (B2C) Analyst, you support data-driven decision-making across all B2C channels: Retail, E-commerce, Digital Marketing & CRM, Site Merchandising, Site Experience, IT & UX and Marketplaces. You collect, analyse and interpret data to deliver clear, actionable insights that improve performance, customer experience and operational efficiency. You are not here to build dashboards that nobody uses.


You are here to help teams make smarter decisions every day, backed by data that is trusted.


What you’ll do

  • Gather and analyze data across B2C channels to spot trends, issues and optimisation opportunities;
  • Build and maintain performance reports and dashboards that track key KPIs across the business;
  • Translate data into clear recommendations for cross-functional teams;
  • Analyze customer behavior to improve journey, engagement and conversion across channels;
  • Support A/B testing and experimentation: design, execution, analysis and learnings;
  • Help improve data quality, governance and consistency across platforms and reporting;
  • Support strategic projects with data-driven insights and structured analysis;
  • Contribute to forecasting and predictive analysis to anticipate customer behaviour and sales trends;
  • Work closely with B2C teams to embed insights into daily decisions.


What success looks like in your first year

  • Stakeholders rely on your reporting and insights because they are clear, consistent and actionable;
  • Dashboards and reports are adopted and used in weekly/monthly rhythms;
  • Your analyses lead to measurable improvements (conversion, engagement, trading performance or efficiency);
  • A/B tests produce learnings that actually change how we work;
  • Data definitions and quality improve, reducing noise and confusion across teams.


What makes this role exciting

  • You work across the full B2C ecosystem: retail, ecommerce, CRM, marketing, marketplaces and site experience;
  • You influence both performance and customer experience, not just one side;
  • You get room to test, learn and improve, with teams that want to act on insights;
  • You help shape how decisions are made as we scale and grow internationally;
  • You work with strong brands and real omnichannel momentum.


You’ll probably love this role if you…

  • enjoy turning messy data into clear direction;
  • like working with many stakeholders and helping them move faster;
  • care about both performance and customer experience;
  • get energy from experimentation and learning what actually works;
  • prefer practical impact over endless analysis.


What you bring

  • Bachelor’s degree in Data Science, Business Analytics, Statistics, Economics, Marketing or a related field;
  • 5+ years of experience in analytics / BI / data analysis, preferably in B2C retail or ecommerce;
  • Strong proficiency with tools such as Google Analytics, SQL, Excel and Power BI or Tableau;
  • Solid understanding of ecommerce metrics, digital marketing analytics and retail performance;
  • Experience working cross-functionally in a fast-paced, data-driven environment;
  • Fluent English (additional languages are a plus);
  • Strong communication skills: you can explain insights to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.


What Just Brands is really like

We’re team first. We keep it direct, make clear decisions and take ownership. No ego. Just sharp collaboration, honest conversations and a team that likes improving what matters.


You’ll Join a Company Where:

  • People help each other out;
  • Ideas and people matter more than job titles;
  • Hard work matters, and so does enjoying the ride;
  • If something can be better, we improve it.


What you get

You step into a role with real influence on B2C decisions across multiple channels. You’ll work closely with teams that need insight to perform and you’ll help build a stronger data-driven culture across the business.


  • End-of-year bonus equal to one month’s gross salary;
  • A healthy and varied lunch every day;
  • Access to our own gym and fitness classes;
  • Parties and gatherings that you’ll talk about for years to come;
  • A tight-knit and super friendly team;
  • Exceptional employee discounts on our clothing.


Ready to turn insight into impact across B2C?


Still reading? Good sign.

If you want to work close to performance, customer experience and real decision-making, and you want your analyses to actually change outcomes, this could be your next step.


Ready to apply?

Title: Data-Analist
Description:
Bij ista Nederland bevinden we ons midden in een fundamentele transformatie. De komende jaren zetten we grote stappen in digitalisering, datagedreven werken en de verdere professionalisering van onze organisatie. Data speelt hierin een steeds belangrijkere rol.




Binnen het team Business Insights werken we eraan om data toegankelijker, begrijpelijker en relevanter te maken voor de hele organisatie. Om deze ontwikkeling te versnellen, zoeken wij een Data-Analist die data weet te vertalen naar concrete inzichten en hiermee bijdraagt aan betere besluitvorming binnen het Management Team en de organisatie.




In deze rol werk je samen met een klein en ervaren team, waarin je de ruimte krijgt om te leren, impact te maken en actief bij te dragen aan de verdere ontwikkeling van data binnen ista.




Dit ga je doen

Als Data-Analist vertaal je data naar stuurinformatie en draag je bij aan de verdere datagedreven ontwikkeling van ista.




Business analyse & data (Power BI)

Ontwikkel en onderhoud je dashboards en rapportages (voornamelijk in Power BI).
Je bouwt mee aan ETL-processen en de doorontwikkeling van het datawarehouse.
Vertaal je businessvragen van verschillende afdelingen naar concrete data-inzichten en rapportages.
Analyseer je data en formuleer je heldere conclusies en aanbevelingen.
Lever je proactief inzichten die bijdragen aan besluitvorming binnen het MT.
Ondersteun je de transformatie van ista-processen door het leveren van relevante business insights.




Inzichten & organisatiebrede ondersteuning

Voer je analyses uit op het gebied van bijvoorbeeld marktontwikkeling, concurrentie, financiën en HR.
Signaleer je trends en verbeterkansen op basis van data.
Automatiseer en optimaliseer je rapportages die nu nog handmatig worden uitgevoerd.
Draag je bij aan het toegankelijk maken van data binnen de organisatie.




PMO-ondersteuning & procesverbetering

Ondersteun je projecten en transformatietrajecten met data en voortgangsinzichten.
Werk je samen met verschillende afdelingen bij planning en voortgangsbewaking.
Help je bij het implementeren en borgen van verbeterinitiatieven binnen processen.




Dit kun je van ons verwachten

Werken bij een organisatie die volop digitaliseert, groeit en professionaliseert.




ista biedt jou:

Een rol waarin je direct impact hebt op besluitvorming en strategie.
Een aantrekkelijk salaris, het ista Keuze Budget en een vaste 13e maand.
De mogelijkheid om je verder te ontwikkelen in data-analyse, Power BI en business insights.
Samenwerking met een ervaren team waarin je veel kunt leren.
Een omgeving waarin data, technologie en duurzaamheid samenkomen.
Een informele werksfeer met korte lijnen en betrokken collega’s.
Faciliteiten voor hybride werken.




Hier herken jij jezelf in

Je beschikt over een minimaal afgeronde HBO opleiding, bijvoorbeeld in Business Administration, Data, Finance of vergelijkbaar.
Je hebt minimaal 2 jaar ervaring met data-analyse en procesoptimalisatie.
Je hebt affiniteit met data, dashboards en het genereren van inzichten.
Je hebt bij voorkeur ervaring met Power BI of vergelijkbare analysetools.
Je bent analytisch sterk en weet data te vertalen naar begrijpelijke conclusies.
Je stelt de juiste vragen om behoeften en achterliggende vraagstukken scherp te krijgen.
Je communiceert helder en weet inzichten overtuigend over te brengen op verschillende niveaus.
Je creëert draagvlak voor jouw analyses en weet om te gaan met weerstand.
Je werkt proactief en draagt bij aan verbetering en structuur binnen processen.
Je beheerst de Nederlandse en Engelse taal goed.
Je hebt interesse in of staat open voor het gebruik van AI en nieuwe technologieën om efficiënter te werken.







Over ista Nederland B.V.

Wij geven gebouwen een toekomst. Dat doen we met producten en diensten die helpen de CO₂-uitstoot van gebouwen te verminderen. We beheren gegevens en processen die ervoor zorgen dat vastgoed duurzamer, efficiënter, veiliger en comfortabeler wordt.




Onze oplossingen zijn digitaal en ondersteunen vastgoedeigenaren, beheerders en bewoners bij de overstap naar duurzame en toekomstbestendige technologieën. Daarbij staat gebruiksgemak centraal: we maken duurzame keuzes toegankelijk en eenvoudig, zodat iedereen kan bijdragen aan de bescherming van het klimaat.




Wereldwijd hebben we meer dan 48 miljoen draadloze apparaten in gebruik en werken ruim 6.600 medewerkers in 21 landen aan energie-efficiënte gebouwen. Onze producten en diensten worden toegepast in meer dan 14 miljoen woningen en commerciële gebouwen bij ruim 470.000 klanten. In 2025 realiseerde de ista Group een omzet van € 1.287 miljoen.

Title: Marketing Data Analyst
Description:
Data Analyst, Marketing

Amsterdam, hybrid working,

up to 5,000 per month plus benefits




This role offers the chance to sit close to commercial decision making and see your analysis directly influence marketing strategy. You will work across the customer journey, helping teams move towards a more customer centric and data driven way of working while operating in a supportive, modern data environment.




The Company

They are a well established organisation with a strong consumer focus and a growing ambition around data and analytics. The business combines long term stability with increasing investment in modern data capabilities. Marketing and commercial teams are actively engaged in using data to improve performance, customer experience, and decision making.




The Role

Analyse marketing and customer data to uncover actionable insights.
Build and maintain dashboards and reports to support marketing performance tracking.
Partner with marketing stakeholders to support evidence based commercial decisions.
Translate complex data into clear, compelling stories for non technical audiences.
Contribute to improving data literacy and analytical maturity across the business.




Your Skills and Experience

Hands on experience in data analysis within a commercial or marketing context.
Strong SQL and Python capability for data extraction, analysis, and exploration.
Experience building dashboards using tools such as Power BI or Tableau.
Confident communicator with strong stakeholder engagement and storytelling skills.
Comfortable working with imperfect or evolving data and still delivering value.




What They Offer

One year fixed term contract with exposure across the full customer journey.
Hybrid working model based in Amsterdam.
Clear line of sight between your work and real marketing impact.
The opportunity to grow within a stable organisation with modern data ambitions.




How to Apply

If you are looking for a marketing focused data analyst role with visible business impact, apply now to find out more.

Title: Data Controller
Description:
Location: Hengelo, Netherlands

Are you looking for a role where accuracy, cooperation and helpfulness are central? We are looking for an enthusiastic Data Controller for our team. Someone who takes charge of our data with a smile.

About The Team

As part of the supportability engineering group (ca. 65 domain experts) within the Services Segment, you will be member of a great and inspiring team of Logistic Engineering and Obsolescence Management consisting of approximately 22 colleagues.

You enjoy working in a team and are a facilitator in the broadest sense.

About The Job

The main part of the work consists of control and maintaining our database which are essential for delivering our services to our customers. Consistency and accuracy are essential here.

The work requires knowledge of several standards which are used in the field of Logistic Engineering within a military environment. You should find it inspiring and challenging to acquire, maintain, and expand this knowledge and experience to become a professional in this field. Title: Business Intelligence Analyst
Description:
Amsterdam | 40 hours




Urban Gym Group is an industry pioneer within the European wellness and fitness community, with over 60 clubs and studios in major cities across the Netherlands and the United Kingdom. You might know us from brands such as Trainmore, ClubSportive, THE CLB, TRIB3, PILAT3S and Gymbox. Our ambitious domestic and international growth plans require an expansion of our Business Intelligence team.




To support this growth, we are currently looking to hire two BI Analysts with different levels of experience:

BI Analyst with 2 - 4 years of experience
BI Analyst with 5+ years of experience.




Depending on your experience, your role will vary in scope, with additional responsibilities around coaching and strategic impact for more experienced candidates.




We are looking for driven BI Analysts to join our team. In this role, you will drive data-driven decision-making across the organisation and, depending on experience, contribute to coaching and developing other analysts, as well as shaping our data strategy and ensuring high-quality insights that directly impact business performance.




Working closely with Finance, Marketing, Operations, and senior leadership, you will extract actionable insights from our data, helping optimise operations, enhance member experiences, and support our ambitious growth plans.

Key responsibilities:




Data & Analytics

Conduct market research and analyses to identify new club locations
Develop business cases for expansion, including new builds, mergers, and acquisitions
Design, build, and maintain robust ETL processes to structure data from various sources
Create data models, views, tables, and reports supporting operational and strategic goals
Develop dashboards and visualisations to enable informed, data-driven decisions
Analyse growth, customer behaviour, and performance to identify opportunities and risks
Query databases to uncover insights related to revenue, member retention, and engagement
Translate data into actionable recommendations to support commercial and strategic decisions




Leadership & Team Management (depending on experience)

Coach and develop Data Analysts
Establish best practices in analytics, reporting, and data governance
Act as a key stakeholder for senior leadership, translating business needs into analytical solutions
Drive continuous improvement within the BI team, including tools, processes, and capabilities




You:

We encourage candidates with different levels of experience to apply. You bring:

2–4 years or 5+ years of experience in a data-focused role (e.g., Data Analyst, BI Analyst, or Analytics Consultant)
Proven experience in data modelling, pipeline creation, and analytics
Advanced proficiency in SQL, with solid experience in Azure SQL environments
Hands-on experience building ETL pipelines, ideally using Python or Azure Synapse Analytics
Experience with Power BI, with a track record of building impactful dashboards
Strong business acumen, ideally within fitness, wellness, retail, or a consumer-focused industry
Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills
Strong problem-solving mindset and attention to detail
Experience in fast-paced, scaling organisations is a plus
Experience coaching or mentoring others is a plus
Located in the Netherlands




To foster collaboration, coaching, and team energy, we expect our colleagues to work on-site (head office or clubs) at least 4 days per week (and up to 5 days depending on the role).

We offer:

A competitive salary plus 8% holiday pay
26 holidays per year (based on full-time employment) and the option to exchange public holidays
Pension plan to support your future
The chance to join our Work in Club program and contribute to charity work once a year
Unlimited access to all our high-end fitness locations for you and a +1
Unlimited access to well-being services for you and your family via OpenUp
An inspiring head office, a short 10-minute walk from Amsterdam Central Station
A diverse and energetic team of 500 colleagues pushing boundaries and supporting one another

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
As Data Analyst, you play a key role in driving data-informed decision-making across one of LYNX’s most strategic product and business domains.

We are looking for four Data Analysts to join one of our core squads: Onboarding, Demand Capture, Client Experience, or Client & Product Integrity.


Onboarding Squad: Analyze and improve the customer onboarding journey to make it faster, smoother, and more efficient.
Demand Capture Squad: Use data to understand customer interest and help turn prospects into qualified leads and customers.
Client Experience Squad: Analyze client behavior, feedback, and platform usage to improve the trading experience, increase loyalty, and reduce churn.
Client and Product Integrity Squad: Support smarter, data-driven compliance and due diligence processes tailored to client needs and risk profiles.


In this role, you will help turn data into actionable insights that improve client journeys, optimize commercial performance, strengthen compliance processes, and support better business decisions.

You will own the full lifecycle of data-driven discovery, from connecting and exploring data to modelling, visualizing, and deploying solutions. Your work will directly influence how we grow, serve, and protect our clients.

What You’ll Do


End-to-End Analytics Ownership: Own the full process of data-driven discovery, from sourcing and exploring data to modelling, dashboarding, and delivering scalable solutions.
Business Problem Solving: Translate complex business challenges into practical, data-based solutions that create measurable impact.
Dashboard & KPI Development: Build dashboards, reporting frameworks, and tracking models that support decision-making and performance management over time.
Stakeholder Partnership: Work closely with Product, Marketing, Operations, Compliance, and Commercial teams to understand priorities and turn questions into insights.
Data Exploration & Insight Generation: Analyze structured and unstructured datasets to identify patterns, risks, opportunities, and growth levers.
Experimentation & Optimization: Support testing, experimentation, and continuous improvement initiatives with strong analytical input.
Data Quality & Governance: Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and reliability across reporting and analytics outputs.
Squad Impact Contribution: Depending on your squad, contribute to improving onboarding flows, lead conversion, client loyalty, churn reduction, or smarter compliance processes.﻿


Who You Are

You are a curious and proactive analyst who enjoys solving business problems with data. You combine technical skills with commercial awareness and communicate insights in a clear and practical way.


You have strong analytical skills and confidence working with structured and unstructured data
You have solid Python and SQL skills, including advanced querying
You have a proactive, self-driven mindset and take ownership of your work
You communicate clearly and can explain complex topics in a simple way
You have a high standard for quality and strong attention to detail
You are comfortable working with cross-functional stakeholders
You are motivated by continuous improvement and measurable impact


Nice to have


Knowledge of financial markets and products such as options and futures
Experience in fintech, brokerage, or other data-rich environments
Experience with BI tools and dashboarding platforms
Experience working in agile product squads


What Do We Offer


A competitive salary
a fixed 13 th month;
8% holiday allowance;
a pension scheme fully paid by LYNX;
public transport travel allowance;
home office equipment and home office allowance;
continuous growth potential, including a personal training budget of € 2,000 per year to invest at your own discretion;
daily lunch from our chef, beverages & fruit, Friday drinks at our own bar;
Multiple trips & activities


Who We Are

“LYNX helps you invest in yourself.”

“Working at LYNX means joining the LYNX family.”

“The development opportunities make LYNX the best place to work.”

This is what employees say about LYNX — and it reflects exactly what we aim to offer: an environment where you can get the best out of yourself.

From our offices in Amsterdam, Ghent, Berlin, and Prague, we work every day to provide private and professional clients with the best trading opportunities through a fast, user-friendly, and reliable platform.

LYNX is an international FinTech company where around 300 colleagues contribute to client success across Europe in an informal, collaborative, and growth-oriented environment.

We're an equal-opportunity employer. We welcome applications from all suitably qualified and eligible candidates without attention to gender identity/expression, age, racial, ethnic and cultural background, religion and beliefs, sexual orientation/identity, disability or neurodiversity.

Title: Data Analyst - Entry Level
Description:
At TCC Global, we create innovative loyalty marketing solutions that drive customer engagement and strengthen brand loyalty for some of the world’s leading retailers. Our passionate team delivers exceptional results through precision execution, strong client partnerships, and seamless operational processes.

As a Data Analyst within the Data & Analytics (D&A) department, you will sit in TCC’s client- and stakeholder-facing BI team. You will play a central role in proving TCC’s value proposition by measuring loyalty campaign ROI, analyzing the drivers of campaign performance, and translating findings into clear proof points and business insights that inform commercial and operational decisions. The role carries hands-on tasks across measurement, analysis, data pipeline building, and report development. You will partner with Marketing, Sales, and Operations to deliver insights, scale campaign measurement, support commercial proposals, and optimize campaign execution through in-store and digital channels. Working day-to-day with Power BI, Azure ML, and AI tooling, you will help shift the business toward democratized, AI-served insights — delivered faster, embedded with stakeholders, and closer to the decisions they support.

The role supports the BI function within the Data & Analytics department, with the following responsibilities:


Measure and analyze campaign performance and ROI; translate results into proof points that demonstrate TCC’s value proposition, in close collaboration with Marketing.
Deliver business analyses that support commercial proposals, client conversations, and internal de-cision-making across Commercial, Delivery, and Operations.
Respond to ad-hoc analysis requests from across the business — turning open-ended questions into structured analyses with clear, timely answers.
Build and maintain Power BI reports and dashboards.
Develop and optimize data pipelines on TCC’s data platform (Azure).
Contribute to the evolution of analytical and AI-served tools (including Enterprise AI / text2sql) that put insights directly in the hands of colleagues and clients.
Use AI-assisted tooling to accelerate analysis, pipeline, and reporting work.
Support running solutions — monitor pipelines and reports in production, investigate issues, and contribute to iterative improvement.
Apply data governance standards in day-to-day work, ensuring trusted, well-documented outputs.
Participate in agile delivery ceremonies (planning, stand-ups, reviews, retrospectives) and share best practices across the team.



Must‑haves: 


1–2 years of experience in a Data Analyst, BI Analyst, or similar role, with hands-on experience in performance/campaign analysis and dashboard development;
Strong analytical and technical skills across SQL, Python, statistics, Power BI (including DAX/data modelling), and cloud-based data environments (preferably Azure);
Ability to turn complex data into actionable business insights and communicate effectively with both technical and non-technical stakeholders;
Comfortable working in agile, fast-paced environments, collaborating cross-functionally, and using AI-assisted tools to improve analysis and reporting workflows;
Fluent English.



Nice‑to‑haves:


Exposure to Azure AI Foundry and broader modern AI/data platforms;
Experience in retail, loyalty, marketing, or campaign analytics;
Additional language skills such as Dutch, Spanish, Portuguese, or German;
Strong curiosity for emerging AI tooling and continuous learning across the data and AI stack;
Practical experience with data pipelines, ELT/ETL processes, testing/data quality practices, and software engineering fundamentals such as Git and code reviews.



What we offer:


Competitive salary and annual bonus.
Opportunities for growth and professional development.
A dynamic and supportive work environment where your ideas truly matter.
Hybrid working model.



TCC is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All applicants will be considered without distinction of age, culture, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, ethnicity, or disability status.

Title: Business Data Analyst
Description:
Business Analyst | AI Readiness & Data Governance | Rotterdam

Grote organisatie binnen de telecomsector |




OVER DE FUNCTIE Binnen het AI & Automation team van een grote speler in de telecomsector wordt gewerkt aan de automatisering van interne processen via innovatieve AI-tools. De ambitie is helder: een stap zetten naar geavanceerde Workflow Automation en Agentic AI, te beginnen met use cases binnen het HR-domein. Denk aan AI-gedreven onboarding en slimme interne chatbots voor HR-beleidsvragen.

Een AI-agent is zo sterk als de data waarmee deze gevoed wordt. In deze rol focus jij je op Fase 1: Discovery & Data Readiness. Als analytische bruggenbouwer onderzoek je welke data nodig is, waar deze staat, hoe schoon deze is, en hoe we deze structureel klaarstomen voor AI-integratie.

WAT GA JE DOEN

Use Case Scoping & Prioritization

Je analyseert de voorgestelde HR-use cases en weegt businesswaarde af tegen technische haalbaarheid en databeschikbaarheid.

Data & System Blueprinting

Je brengt het datalandschap in kaart: welke bronsystemen zijn essentieel en kunnen deze ontsloten worden door de AI-architectuur?

Data Quality Assessment & Gap Analysis

Je toetst de huidige staat van de data: schoon, gestructureerd en actueel genoeg?
Je definieert de remediatiestappen om data 'AI-ready' te maken.

Kennismanagement Architectuur

Je onderzoekt hoe ongestructureerde documentatie (zoals HR-policies) momenteel wordt beheerd.
Je adviseert over versiebeheer en structurering ten behoeve van AI-integratie.

Data Governance & Stewardship

Je ontwerpt een werkbaar model voor data-eigenaarschap met heldere rollen en verantwoordelijkheden, zodat broninformatie ook in de toekomst up-to-date blijft.

WAT WIJ ZOEKEN We zoeken geen developer, maar een procesdenker met sterke affiniteit voor data en AI.

Aantoonbare ervaring als Business Analyst, Data Analyst of Data Steward, bij voorkeur rondom datakwaliteit, compliance of digitalisering.
Ervaring met Data Readiness assessments en/of Discovery trajecten binnen corporate omgevingen.
Conceptueel begrip van hoe AI-modellen (LLM's, RAG-systemen) werken en welke eisen dit stelt aan datakwaliteit en documentbeheer.

Gestructureerd, vasthoudend en in staat complexe bevindingen te vertalen naar een helder adviesrapport of blueprint.

Business Analyst | AI Readiness & Data Governance | Rotterdam

Grote organisatie binnen de telecomsector |


OVER DE FUNCTIE Binnen het AI & Automation team van een grote speler in de telecomsector wordt gewerkt aan de automatisering van interne processen via innovatieve AI-tools. De ambitie is helder: een stap zetten naar geavanceerde Workflow Automation en Agentic AI, te beginnen met use cases binnen het HR-domein. Denk aan AI-gedreven onboarding en slimme interne chatbots voor HR-beleidsvragen.

Een AI-agent is zo sterk als de data waarmee deze gevoed wordt. In deze rol focus jij je op Fase 1: Discovery & Data Readiness. Als analytische bruggenbouwer onderzoek je welke data nodig is, waar deze staat, hoe schoon deze is, en hoe we deze structureel klaarstomen voor AI-integratie.

WAT GA JE DOEN

Use Case Scoping & Prioritization

  • Je analyseert de voorgestelde HR-use cases en weegt businesswaarde af tegen technische haalbaarheid en databeschikbaarheid.

Data & System Blueprinting

  • Je brengt het datalandschap in kaart: welke bronsystemen zijn essentieel en kunnen deze ontsloten worden door de AI-architectuur?

Data Quality Assessment & Gap Analysis

  • Je toetst de huidige staat van de data: schoon, gestructureerd en actueel genoeg?
  • Je definieert de remediatiestappen om data 'AI-ready' te maken.

Kennismanagement Architectuur

  • Je onderzoekt hoe ongestructureerde documentatie (zoals HR-policies) momenteel wordt beheerd.
  • Je adviseert over versiebeheer en structurering ten behoeve van AI-integratie.

Data Governance & Stewardship

  • Je ontwerpt een werkbaar model voor data-eigenaarschap met heldere rollen en verantwoordelijkheden, zodat broninformatie ook in de toekomst up-to-date blijft.

WAT WIJ ZOEKEN We zoeken geen developer, maar een procesdenker met sterke affiniteit voor data en AI.

  • Aantoonbare ervaring als Business Analyst, Data Analyst of Data Steward, bij voorkeur rondom datakwaliteit, compliance of digitalisering.

Title: E-commerce Business Intelligence & Magento Specialist
Description:
About the Role

Are you an experienced data-driven e-commerce professional who enjoys turning insights into action? At ASUS, we’re looking for someone who can seamlessly connect data, tools, and execution to drive commercial performance across our Western Europe D2C business.

In this role, you’ll sit at the intersection of business intelligence, pricing strategy, and e-commerce operations. You’ll take ownership of how pricing and promotions are executed in our Magento platform, while continuously analyzing performance and market dynamics to optimize results.

You won’t just report on data—you’ll actively shape commercial decisions, ensuring our pricing and promotions stay competitive and impactful across markets.




About the Contract

This agreement is offered on a temporary basis to cover a maternity leave absence.




What You’ll Do

Own Pricing & Promotions Execution (Magento)

Configure and manage pricing, discount rules, and promotional campaigns in Magento
Ensure accuracy, consistency, and timely execution across markets
Validate setups and troubleshoot issues in a fast-paced environment

Turn Data into Commercial Impact

Analyze sales performance during campaigns and identify optimization opportunities
Monitor competitor pricing and market trends in real time
Translate insights into clear actions that improve conversion and revenue

Act as a Regional Commercial Advisor

Proactively identify pricing gaps or missed opportunities
Provide actionable recommendations to local country teams
Support markets in reaching revenue targets through smarter pricing strategies

Build Reliable Data Foundations

Maintain and improve data pipelines across tools (e.g., GA4, Looker Studio, BI dashboards)
Ensure data accuracy and real-time availability for decision-making
Connect multiple data sources (internal + external) into a coherent insight layer




What You Bring

Strong Analytics & BI Expertise

Hands-on experience with tools like Power BI, Tableau, Excel, GA4, or Looker Studio
Ability to structure, analyze, and interpret complex datasets

Understanding of Data Systems & Connectivity

Familiarity with APIs, data flows, and how systems integrate
Comfortable working with multiple tools and data sources

E-commerce Experience (2+ years)

Experience in D2C or B2C e-commerce environments
Understanding of pricing, promotions, and conversion drivers

Execution-Focused & Detail-Oriented

Able to move between strategy and hands-on execution quickly
High attention to detail when working in technical platforms

Strong Communicator

Fluent in English
Able to translate data into clear, actionable recommendations




Nice to Have

Experience with Magento (Adobe Commerce), especially pricing rules and promotions
Experience working in international or regional e-commerce teams




Why Join ASUS?

Work with a globally recognized tech brand at the forefront of innovation
Be part of a high-impact, data-driven D2C team
Take ownership of work that directly influences revenue and market competitiveness
Enjoy a hybrid working model based in Amsterdam

Title: Business Intelligence Intern
Description:
Who We Are




Metyis is a global and forward-thinking firm operating across a wide range of industries, developing and delivering AI & Data, Digital Commerce, Marketing & Design solutions and Advisory services. At Metyis, our long-term partnership model brings long-lasting impact and growth to our business partners and clients through extensive execution capabilities.

With our team, you can experience a collaborative environment with highly skilled multidisciplinary experts, where everyone has room to build bigger and bolder ideas. Being part of Metyis means you can speak your mind and be creative with your knowledge. Imagine the things you can achieve with a team that encourages you to be the best version of yourself.




We are Metyis. Partners for Impact.




What We Offer




2 months of intensive training from our super skilled BI team, on topics like data warehousing, data modelling and Power BI reporting (Data transformation, DAX, report building).
Followed by 4 months of relevant working experience on a live business case.
Interact with clients regularly to drive their business towards impactful change.
Play a key role in the team by creating new business solutions via data-driven insights.
Receive guidance by a dedicated mentor to make sure you make the most out of your time at Metyis.
Experience being part of a fast-growing international and diverse team.




What You Will Do




Assist in the design, development and maintenance of BI reporting systems.
Understand with data warehousing and data modelling activities.
Participate in the creation of data-driven solutions to support business needs.
Collaborate with data scientists, business analysts and software engineers to understand and implement reporting requirements.
Participate in report reviews and providing constructive feedback.
Stay up to date with the latest developments in all the BI tech stacks and best practices.




What You’ll Bring




Currently pursuing a Master's degree in Business Analytics, Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics or a related field.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to derive insights from complex data sets.
Basic understanding of SQL or BI is helpful.
Ability to work in a team environment.
A passion for data analysis and a desire to learn and grow, in the field of business intelligence.




At Metyis, we are driven by curiosity and collaboration. We value diversity, equity, inclusion, and belonging (DEIB) in all its forms as it makes us stronger as an organisation and promotes creativity and innovation. We welcome all talents and are committed to creating a workplace where every employee can make a meaningful impact and grow.

Title: Data-analist
Description:
Over de organisatie

Je komt terecht bij een organisatie met een belangrijke maatschappelijke rol binnen een stedelijke omgeving. Dagelijks wordt er gewerkt aan het verbinden van mensen en regio’s door middel van betrouwbare dienstverlening.







De organisatie heeft een sterke focus op kwaliteit, duurzaamheid en innovatie. De cultuur is open en samenwerkingsgericht, met korte lijnen en veel ruimte voor eigen initiatief. Collega’s zijn betrokken, professioneel en delen een gezamenlijke ambitie om continu te verbeteren.




Over de functie

Als Data Analist ga je aan de slag binnen een gespecialiseerd data-, analyse- en rapportageteam. Je werkt nauw samen met data specialisten en inhoudelijke experts uit verschillende onderdelen van de organisatie. In deze rol ben jij de schakel tussen data en business: je vertaalt vraagstukken naar concrete analyses en bruikbare inzichten.




Wij hebben momenteel 3 openstaande rollen: 2x Data Analist (business gericht) en 1x Data Analist HR (met focus op HR-data en vraagstukken). Voor alle rollen geldt dat je werkt aan uiteenlopende projecten waarbij je databronnen onderzoekt, datamodellen ontwerpt en dashboards ontwikkelt. Je krijgt de ruimte om initiatief te tonen en actief bij te dragen aan het verder ontwikkelen van datagedreven werken binnen de organisatie. De HR-rol richt zich specifiek op thema’s zoals personeelsplanning, capaciteit en verzuim, waarbij je strategische HR-besluitvorming ondersteunt met data.







Wat ga je doen

Functioneren als aanspreekpunt voor datavraagstukken vanuit verschillende afdelingen
Analyseren en structureren van diverse databronnen
Ontwerpen en optimaliseren van datamodellen
Ontwikkelen van dashboards en rapportages in Power BI
Automatiseren van dataprocessen (o.a. met Power Automate)
Signaleren van trends en vertalen van data naar concrete inzichten
Samenwerken met data professionals en bijdragen aan gezamenlijke standaarden







Voor de HR-rol:

Analyseren van HR-data en vertalen naar inzichten voor HR en management
Verbeteren van datakwaliteit en ondersteunen van HR-processen




Wie ben jij

Je hebt een afgeronde WO-opleiding (bijv. Economie, Bedrijfskunde, Wiskunde, Informatiekunde of Data Science)
Je hebt 3 tot 5 jaar ervaring als Data Analist of BI-professional
Je hebt ruime ervaring met Power BI (DAX, datamodellen, visualisaties)
Je beheerst SQL en hebt bij voorkeur ervaring met Python
Je bent analytisch sterk en weet complexe informatie begrijpelijk te maken
Je bent communicatief vaardig en schakelt gemakkelijk met stakeholders
Je werkt zelfstandig, bent proactief en denkt mee over verbeteringen




Pré: ervaring met ERP-systemen, moderne data platforms of HR-data




Salaris en arbeidsvoorwaarden

Salaris tot €6.650 o.b.v. 36 uur
8% vakantiegeld + 8,33% eindejaarsuitkering
Opleidingsmogelijkheden
Pensioenregeling en een extra levensloopuitkering van 1,5%
Bijdrage zorgverzekering en zorgkosten
Extra’s zoals een extra uitkering en een aanbrengbonus
Start met jaarcontract, met uitzicht op een vast contract




Interesse?

Kan jij je vinden in de bovenstaande beschrijving en wil je een stap maken in je carrière? Neem dan contact op met ons. Stuur je een recent CV mee? Dan kunnen we meteen kijken welke van de 3 rollen het beste bij jou past.

  • Extra’s zoals een extra uitkering en een aanbrengbonus
  • Start met jaarcontract, met uitzicht op een vast contract


Interesse?

Kan jij je vinden in de bovenstaande beschrijving en wil je een stap maken in je carrière? Neem dan contact op met ons. Stuur je een recent CV mee? Dan kunnen we meteen kijken welke van de 3 rollen het beste bij jou past.

Title: Senior Data Analyst
Description:
Department

WDTech - R&D

We are Walker & Dunlop. We are one of the largest providers of capital to the commercial real estate industry, enabling real estate owners and operators to bring their visions of communities — where people live, work, shop, and play — to life. We are committed to creating meaningful social, environmental, and economic change in our communities.

Department Overview

WDTech is W&D’s in-house technology team – a group of collaborative and highly skilled technology professionals, all of whom are leading experts in real estate data, data science, and technology.

WDTech Engineering builds solutions that impact not only our products but also the people and processes across our organization. A commitment to innovation and a passion for disrupting the old-fashioned real estate industry are our highest priorities.

The Impact You Will Have

As a Senior Data Analyst, you will play a key role in delivering trusted data insights and analytics that support business and product decision-making across the organization. This role is responsible for analyzing complex datasets, developing reporting solutions and dashboards, and translating data into actionable insights that improve operational effectiveness and support strategic initiatives.

Working closely with Data Analysts, BI Analysts, Data Engineers, Data QA Engineers, Data Scientists, and Product Managers, you will help ensure data products are accurate, scalable, and aligned with evolving business needs as Walker & Dunlop continues to grow as a data-driven organization.

Primary Responsibilities


Analyze and curate data sources to support business and product stakeholders in making informed decisions.
Lead key components of the analytical lifecycle, including data exploration, analysis, reporting, and insight delivery.
Translate complex data into clear, actionable insights for technical and non-technical audiences.
Develop and maintain Power BI dashboards, reports, and analytical solutions.
Perform data wrangling, transformation, and analysis using SQL and enterprise analytical databases.
Define and document datasets, business logic, and reporting definitions to support consistent data usage.
Partner with data and product teams to support data governance, data quality, and data management processes.
Analyze user engagement, operational, and product data to identify trends and opportunities for improvement.
Mentor junior analysts and promote best practices in analytics, visualization, and stakeholder collaboration.
Perform other duties as assigned


Education And Experience


Bachelor’s degree preferred, preferably in Computer Science, Data Analytics, Information Systems, Mathematics, or a related field.
6+ years of experience in data analysis, business intelligence, or analytics roles with demonstrated ownership of end-to-end analytical projects.
Strong experience working with enterprise analytical databases such as Snowflake, Redshift, BigQuery, or similar technologies.
Experience developing dashboards and reporting solutions using Power BI, Tableau, or similar visualization tools.
Experience with SQL, data transformation, and analytical reporting workflows.
Experience with Python and geospatial analysis preferred.
Real estate, financial services, or related industry experience preferred.


Knowledge, Skills And Abilities


Deep expertise in SQL and data analysis techniques.
Strong proficiency with data visualization and reporting tools such as Power BI or Tableau.
Understanding of data modeling, ETL processes, and analytical best practices.
Ability to communicate technical concepts and analytical findings clearly to business and technical audiences.
Strong analytical, organizational, and problem-solving skills.
Ability to work collaboratively across technical and business teams in a fast-paced environment.
Familiarity with AI-enabled tools that support reporting, documentation, and analysis workflows preferred.
High level of accountability, attention to detail, and commitment to continuous improvement.
Ability to show ownership of your work, take on challenges and acknowledge growth opportunities, and demonstrate patience when learning new processes
Courtesy, respect, and thoughtfulness in teaming with colleagues and other stakeholders


What We Offer 


You will have the opportunity to accelerate in our rapidly growing organization.
Agile working environment with flexible working hours and location, career advancement, and competitive compensation package.
We are a family friendly company.
We arrange social activities to help our employees and families become familiar with each other and our culture.
In addition to other benefits, we offer a pension scheme and 100% complimentary and confidential mental health services.


EEO Statement

We are committed to equity in all steps of the recruitment and employment experience. We believe in equal access to opportunities in our workplace. We do not tolerate discrimination, including harassment, based on any characteristic protected by applicable law, such as race, color, national origin, religion, gender identity, sexual orientation, sex, age, disability, veteran or military status, and genetic information, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law. We strive to be a safe place to ask questions, build professional relationships, and develop careers.

SPAM

Please be wary of recruitment scams. An indication of a scam might be a request for sensitive or bank information at the time of application or emails coming from a non walkerdunlop.com email address. Please call us at 301.215.5500, if you have any concerns about information requested during or after the application process.

Title: Business Data Analist
Description:
Wil jij werken in een dynamische omgeving waar innovatie, verbetering en groei centraal staan? En krijg je energie van het optimaliseren van processen en datastromen? Dan is dit jouw kans om écht impact te maken binnen een logistieke organisatie die volop in ontwikkeling is.




Over de organisatie

Je komt terecht bij een ondernemende organisatie met korte lijnen en een no-nonsense mentaliteit. De werksfeer is informeel, professioneel en resultaatgericht. Er wordt continu gewerkt aan verdere professionalisering, met een sterke focus op innovatie binnen IT en HR.

Hier stap je niet in een gespreid bedje, maar juist jouw ideeën, initiatief en expertise maken het verschil.




Je krijgt volop ruimte om mee te bouwen aan structuur, optimalisatie en slimme oplossingen. Samen met een multidisciplinair IT-team van business applications- en infrastructuurspecialisten werk je onder leiding van de IT Manager aan de verdere groei van de organisatie.




Over de functie

Als Business Data Analist speel je een sleutelrol in het verbeteren en toekomstbestendig maken van het IT-landschap. Je bent verantwoordelijk voor het ontwerpen, beheren en optimaliseren van data- en systeemintegraties en zorgt ervoor dat datastromen efficiënt, betrouwbaar en schaalbaar zijn.




Je schakelt dagelijks met verschillende stakeholders binnen de organisatie en vertaalt businessbehoeften naar slimme technische oplossingen. Met jouw analytische blik signaleer je verbeterkansen en draag je actief bij aan innovatie en procesoptimalisatie.




Jouw verantwoordelijkheden

Ontwikkelen, beheren en optimaliseren van data-integraties tussen verschillende systemen
Analyseren van bedrijfsprocessen en vertalen naar technische oplossingen
Verbeteren van datakwaliteit en optimaliseren van datastromen
Intensief samenwerken met interne teams en externe developers
Signaleren én doorvoeren van verbeteringen binnen het IT-landschap




Wie ben jij?

Je hebt minimaal 3 jaar relevante werkervaring in een vergelijkbare rol
Je hebt ervaring met API’s, EDI- en/of ETL-processen
Je werkt graag met tools zoals Power BI
Je schakelt moeiteloos tussen business en IT
Ervaring binnen de logistieke sector is een sterke pré
Je bent proactief, analytisch en denkt in oplossingen




Aanbod

Salaris tot €5.500 bruto per maand o.b.v. fulltime
25 vakantiedagen
Mogelijkheid tot hybride werken
Reiskostenvergoeding van €0,23 per kilometer
Veel vrijheid, verantwoordelijkheid en ruimte voor eigen initiatief
Volop mogelijkheden om jezelf verder te ontwikkelen
Een uitgebreide lunchregeling
Toegang tot gymfaciliteiten




Ben jij klaar om jouw expertise in te zetten binnen een organisatie waar je écht het verschil kunt maken?
